text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This must be a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, even if it fades or loses its luster, I must
never lose it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
For my feelings are what breathe life into this
dream world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion returns without incident and we
begin the continuation of her incredible three
years here. On one particular day...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Traineeer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did I scare you? I planned the perfect
surprise attack! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you free right now, Trainer? There's a small
gathering that I'd like you to accompany me to.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to introduce you, Your Excellency. This
is my trainer from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text: A pleasure to make your acquaintance.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The ambassador was a good friend of my father's
while they were in university and has been looking
out for me since I was very young.

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text:
I must say, it brings me much pleasure to see that
rambunctious young girl grown into such a fine
lady.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm still running around to this day. ♪
And it's all thanks to you and the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, I realize the person standing
before me is likely the person who recommended
Fine Motion as a Goodwill Ambassador.

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. The embassy needed a Goodwill
Ambassador, so I merely suggested the best
candidate I had. Your father agreed with my
sentiments.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
He did?

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. He must have noticed just how many
individuals in Japan wished for you to take on
such a role.

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text:
Being posted here myself, I've heard no shortage
of good things about you. You were
recommended for the position by your many
merits.

text_block_list.name: Irish Ambassador
text_block_list.text:
And word of those merits has certainly made its
way to Ireland. The president and Taoiseach both
agreed that you were an excellent fit.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you so much. Truly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I can't help but laugh when I think back.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You were so on edge at the start of the party, I
thought your eyes were going to pop out of your
head.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I thought the atmosphere was rather
easygoing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There were so many people I wanted to introduce
you to, so I thought it would be a great
opportunity to do so in a setting that wasn't
overly formal.
choice_data_list: I could tell how much everyone cares about you.
I could tell how much everyone cares about you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You're right. I do seem to be quite loved.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have to consider my position. Sometimes I can't
help but feel like...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Like they see the figure called "Fine Motion," not
the person inside.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But that was just in my head. Everyone has always
been thinking about what's best for me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That makes me so happy. I'm truly blessed...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's because I was able to find my lucky
clover.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. By which I mean you, Trainer. So many things
changed for me after I met you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You recognized the real me—the me who wished
to run and so led me to even greater happiness.
choice_data_list:
I appreciate you saying so, but I don't think
that's right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So you've finally returned! You're late, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: We've been waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone... Wait, did I have some appointment
with you all?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?! But this was your idea in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you the one who said you wanted to run
together now that you're back?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, was that today?! It completely slipped my
mind!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What else is new?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you manage to stay on top of your
official duties, princess.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur! You're here too?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Like I'd let a chance to collect this much data slip
away from me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see even more people coming our way... Just
how many people did you invite?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: On that note, hurry up and get ready.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The road ahead's a bit different from what you're
used to... So enjoy it, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...What a surprise. I know I made plans with
everyone, but I can't believe how many people
showed up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the Umamusume gathered here today have
been captivated by Fine Motion's running—and
the power she possesses inside of her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That is the highest praise you could give me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, I ought to get going—to the place where I
belong!
